//: The ttsc/Go plugin config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build JS emit (build.ts): the @rhombus-std/di.transformer ttsc plugin (a Go sidecar) lowers the tokenless resolve<T>()/tryResolve<T>()/isService<T>() calls in server-report.ts. Extends the tspc tsconfig but swaps the plugin to the /ttsc descriptor. The `types` augmentation is RETAINED (previously dropped): the tokenless `resolve<T>()` sugar is NOT a real di.core Resolver method — it lives in di.transformer's `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` augment, and declaration-site matching anchors on that sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program. Lint and d.ts emit stay on typescript 5 via the base tsconfig.json.
